sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_intervals (start_date Date, interval IntervalMonth);
UPDATE test_intervals SET interval = toIntervalMonth(6) WHERE start_date = toDate('2024-01-01');
SELECT start_date, start_date + interval AS new_date FROM test_intervals;
SELECT toIntervalMonth(2) AS interval_two_months, toIntervalMonth(5) AS interval_five_months;
